text: Being here, I am awash with a sense of curiosity and reflection. The environment, soaked in light and color, invites inquiry yet also stirs a quiet introspection within me. As I stand before the display, I feel both part of the narrative and a silent observer—eager to connect, but acutely aware of a boundary between my intentions and how they might be perceived. There is comfort in the intellectual purpose of this place, yet an undercurrent of vulnerability lingers, urging me to ponder the nuanced dance of perception and meaning.
